[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001000 1
1 0100000010 2
2 0001110110 5
3 0001000111 4
4 1111011001 7
5 0100100010 3
6 0110010110 5
7 0000001000 1

01 10 0001000110 3
12 21 0001000110 3
23 32 0001000001 2
34 43 0100000000 1
45 54 0100000010 2 match 1
56 65 0000000000 a
67 76 0000000000 a
70 07 1011000101 5

02 20 0001000111 4 match 3
13 31 0001010000 2
24 42 0000000010 1
35 53 0110010000 3
46 64 0000000000 a
57 75 0110000100 3
60 06 0000000000 a
71 17 0001000100 2

03 30 1011000001 4
14 41 0000100010 2
25 52 0000000110 2
36 63 0000001000 1 match 0 7
47 74 0100000000 1
50 05 0010000110 3
61 16 0000000000 a
72 27 0001000101 3

15 51 0000010110 3
26 62 0000000000 a
37 73 1111000001 5
